meta.title: NBFC Phase-1 Compliance Obligation Library
meta.status: DRAFT_UNVERIFIED — every entry requires verification by a qualified Company Secretary / Chartered Accountant against the latest statutes, RBI Master Directions, and CIMS return taxonomy before production use.
meta.scope: Indian NBFC (Base/Middle Layer under RBI Scale-Based Regulation). Phase-1 seed.

law_library.name: RBI Master Direction – Scale Based Regulation (SBR) for NBFCs, 2023
RBI Master Direction – NBFC Returns / CIMS Reporting
RBI Master Directions – NBFC-ND-SI / NBFC-D Prudential Norms
RBI Master Direction – Know Your Customer (KYC) Direction, 2016
Prevention of Money Laundering Act, 2002 & Rules (FIU-IND)
RBI Master Direction – Credit Information Reporting (CICs)
RBI Master Direction – Monitoring of Frauds in NBFCs
RBI Master Direction – IT Governance, Risk, Controls & Assurance
RBI – Compliance Function & Chief Compliance Officer in NBFCs
RBI – Appointment of Statutory Auditors (SCAs/SAs) Guidelines
RBI – Internal Ombudsman / Grievance Redressal for NBFCs
Companies Act, 2013 & Rules (MCA / ROC)
Income-tax Act, 1961 & Rules (CBDT)
Central/State GST Acts, 2017 & Rules
Foreign Exchange Management Act, 1999 & Rules (RBI/FEMA)
Employees' Provident Funds & Misc. Provisions Act, 1952 (EPFO)
Employees' State Insurance Act, 1948 (ESIC)
State Professional Tax Acts
Sexual Harassment of Women at Workplace (POSH) Act, 2013
Payment of Bonus Act, 1965
State Labour Welfare Fund Acts
State Shops & Establishments Acts
Payment of Gratuity Act, 1972
SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 – Listed Non-Convertible Securities
SEBI (Issue & Listing of Non-Convertible Securities) Regulations, 2021
SEBI (Prohibition of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015
RBI – Guidelines on Digital Lending
SARFAESI Act / CERSAI – Registration of Security Interest
RBI – Acceptance of Public Deposits (NBFC-D) Directions

obligation_templates.title: RBI Quarterly Return – Important Financial Parameters (DNBS02 / CIMS equivalent)
obligation_templates.description: File the quarterly return on important financial parameters of the NBFC (assets, income, NOF, CRAR, NPA) via RBI CIMS portal. Verify exact return code against current CIMS taxonomy.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Non-submission/delay attracts penalty under RBI Act s.58B and supervisory action; persistent default can affect CoR.

obligation_templates.title: RBI Quarterly Return – Reporting of Prudential Norms (DNBS03 / CIMS equivalent)
obligation_templates.description: Quarterly prudential-norms return (asset classification, provisioning, capital market & real-estate exposure) via CIMS.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Penalty under RBI Act; misreporting of prudential norms can trigger inspection findings.

obligation_templates.title: ALM – Statement of Structural Liquidity
obligation_templates.description: Monthly/periodic Asset-Liability Management structural liquidity statement showing maturity-bucket mismatches.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Liquidity-mismatch breaches invite supervisory action; non-reporting penalised under RBI Act.

obligation_templates.title: ALM – Statement of Dynamic Liquidity
obligation_templates.description: Short-term dynamic liquidity statement (typically fortnightly/monthly) for applicable NBFCs.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Supervisory action for liquidity gaps; reporting default penalised.

obligation_templates.title: ALM – Interest Rate Sensitivity Statement
obligation_templates.description: Periodic interest-rate sensitivity (IRS) statement under ALM framework.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Reporting default penalised; gaps flagged in inspection.

obligation_templates.title: Liquidity Coverage Ratio (LCR) maintenance & reporting
obligation_templates.description: Maintain and report LCR (stock of HQLA vs net cash outflows) per RBI glide path for applicable NBFCs.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Breach of minimum LCR is a prudential violation; attracts supervisory action.

obligation_templates.title: Credit Information Reporting to CICs (CIBIL/Equifax/Experian/CRIF)
obligation_templates.description: Submit borrower credit data to all four Credit Information Companies. RBI mandated fortnightly (or shorter) reporting effective 01-Jan-2025 — verify current cadence.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Penalty up to Rs.1 crore per CIC under CIC(R) Act for default; data-quality lapses flagged by RBI.

obligation_templates.title: CRILC Reporting – Large Credit Exposures
obligation_templates.description: Report borrowers with aggregate exposure >= Rs.5 crore to RBI's CRILC; weekly reporting of SMA/default status.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Non/incorrect reporting penalised; weekly SMA default reporting is closely monitored.

obligation_templates.title: CRILC – Weekly SMA / Default Reporting
obligation_templates.description: Weekly reporting of Special Mention Accounts and defaults of large borrowers to CRILC.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Delay in default reporting is a serious supervisory concern.

obligation_templates.title: Cash Transaction Report (CTR) to FIU-IND
obligation_templates.description: Report all cash transactions > Rs.10 lakh (or series of integrally connected transactions) for the month to FIU-IND.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: PMLA penalties Rs.10k–1 lakh per failure; reputational and regulatory consequences.

obligation_templates.title: Suspicious Transaction Report (STR) to FIU-IND
obligation_templates.description: File STR within 7 days of forming suspicion of money laundering / terror financing.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Failure to report is a serious PMLA violation with penalties and personal liability for Principal Officer.

obligation_templates.title: Non-Profit Organisation / NTR & CCR Reporting to FIU-IND
obligation_templates.description: File applicable FIU reports (NTR for NPO receipts, CCR for counterfeit currency, CBWTR for cross-border wire transfers) as triggered.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: PMLA penalties for non-reporting.

obligation_templates.title: Central KYC Registry (CKYCR) Upload
obligation_templates.description: Upload KYC records of new individual/legal-entity accounts to CKYCR within 10 days of account opening.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: RBI penalty for KYC non-compliance; account-opening lapses flagged in inspection.

obligation_templates.title: Periodic KYC Updation (Re-KYC)
obligation_templates.description: Risk-based periodic updation of customer KYC: high-risk every 2 years, medium 8 years, low 10 years.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Stale KYC is a recurring RBI inspection finding; penalties for systemic lapses.

obligation_templates.title: Monthly TDS/TCS Deposit
obligation_templates.description: Deposit tax deducted/collected at source for the month to the credit of Central Government.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Interest @1.5%/month (s.201), penalty (s.221), and disallowance of expense (s.40(a)(ia)); late deposit can be prosecutable.

obligation_templates.title: Quarterly TDS Return – Salaries (24Q)
obligation_templates.description: File quarterly TDS statement for salary deductions.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Late fee Rs.200/day (s.234E) capped at TDS amount; penalty s.271H Rs.10k–1 lakh.

obligation_templates.title: Quarterly TDS Return – Non-Salary (26Q)
obligation_templates.description: File quarterly TDS statement for non-salary deductions (interest, professional fees, rent, contractors).
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Late fee Rs.200/day (s.234E); penalty s.271H.

obligation_templates.title: Quarterly TDS Return – Non-Resident Payments (27Q)
obligation_templates.description: File quarterly TDS statement for payments to non-residents.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Late fee s.234E; penalty s.271H.

obligation_templates.title: Issue of TDS Certificates (Form 16A)
obligation_templates.description: Download from TRACES and issue Form 16A to deductees within 15 days of the TDS return due date.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Penalty Rs.100/day per certificate (s.272A(2)(g)).

obligation_templates.title: Issue of Salary TDS Certificate (Form 16)
obligation_templates.description: Issue annual Form 16 to employees by 15 June following the financial year.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Penalty Rs.100/day per certificate.

obligation_templates.title: Advance Tax Payment (Quarterly Instalments)
obligation_templates.description: Pay advance tax in four instalments: 15% by 15-Jun, 45% by 15-Sep, 75% by 15-Dec, 100% by 15-Mar.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Interest u/s 234B & 234C for shortfall/deferment.

obligation_templates.title: Tax Audit Report (Form 3CA/3CB-3CD)
obligation_templates.description: Obtain and file tax audit report where turnover/gross receipts exceed prescribed limits.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Penalty u/s 271B: 0.5% of turnover up to Rs.1.5 lakh.

obligation_templates.title: Income Tax Return – Company (ITR-6)
obligation_templates.description: File annual corporate income tax return (audited cases by 31-Oct; with TP by 30-Nov).
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Late fee s.234F; interest s.234A; loss of carry-forward; prosecution in extreme cases.

obligation_templates.title: Statement of Financial Transactions (SFT – Form 61A)
obligation_templates.description: Report specified high-value financial transactions for the FY to the IT Department.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Penalty Rs.500/day (s.271FA), Rs.1000/day after notice.

obligation_templates.title: FATCA/CRS Reporting (Form 61B)
obligation_templates.description: Report reportable accounts of foreign tax residents for FATCA/CRS for the calendar year.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Penalty s.271FA / s.271FAA for inaccurate reporting.

obligation_templates.title: Transfer Pricing Report (Form 3CEB)
obligation_templates.description: File accountant's report on international/specified-domestic transactions with associated enterprises.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Penalty s.271BA Rs.1 lakh; s.271AA up to 2% of transaction value.

obligation_templates.title: Foreign Remittance Reporting (Form 15CA/15CB)
obligation_templates.description: File Form 15CA (and 15CB where required) before each foreign remittance to a non-resident.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Penalty s.271-I Rs.1 lakh for non-furnishing.

obligation_templates.title: GSTR-1 – Outward Supplies Return
obligation_templates.description: File details of outward supplies. Monthly (11th) or QRMP quarterly (13th) depending on scheme.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Late fee + interest; mismatch blocks recipient ITC and invites scrutiny.

obligation_templates.title: GSTR-3B – Summary Return & Tax Payment
obligation_templates.description: File monthly/quarterly summary return and pay net GST liability. NBFCs may opt 50% ITC reversal u/s 17(4).
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Interest @18% on late tax; late fee Rs.50/day; persistent default blocks e-way/return filing.

obligation_templates.title: QRMP Monthly Tax Payment (PMT-06)
obligation_templates.description: For QRMP filers, pay tax for the first two months of each quarter via PMT-06.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Interest on delayed payment.

obligation_templates.title: GSTR-9 – Annual Return
obligation_templates.description: File GST annual return consolidating the year's supplies, ITC and tax.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Late fee for delay; reconciliation discrepancies invite notices.

obligation_templates.title: GSTR-9C – Reconciliation Statement
obligation_templates.description: File self-certified reconciliation between audited financials and GSTR-9 where turnover exceeds threshold.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Late fee; mismatches flagged for audit.

obligation_templates.title: Monthly ITC Reconciliation (GSTR-2B vs Books)
obligation_templates.description: Reconcile input tax credit per GSTR-2B with purchase records before claiming ITC in 3B.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Excess/ineligible ITC attracts interest @18% and penalty.

obligation_templates.title: EPF – Monthly Contribution & ECR Filing
obligation_templates.description: Deposit employer+employee PF contributions and file the Electronic Challan-cum-Return by 15th of next month.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Damages u/s 14B (5–25% p.a.) + interest u/s 7Q; non-deposit of employee share is prosecutable.

obligation_templates.title: ESI – Monthly Contribution Deposit
obligation_templates.description: Deposit ESI contributions by 15th of next month for covered employees.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Interest @12% p.a. + damages; non-payment is prosecutable.

obligation_templates.title: ESI – Half-Yearly Return of Contributions
obligation_templates.description: File half-yearly ESI return of contributions (Apr–Sep and Oct–Mar).
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Penalty for non-filing.

obligation_templates.title: Professional Tax – Deposit & Return (State-wise)
obligation_templates.description: Deduct and deposit professional tax and file the periodic PT return per applicable state (frequency varies by state).
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Interest + penalty per state Act for late deposit/filing.

obligation_templates.title: Labour Welfare Fund Contribution (State-wise)
obligation_templates.description: Deposit LWF contribution per applicable state schedule (half-yearly/annual varies).
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Penalty per state LWF Act.

obligation_templates.title: Payroll TDS Computation (Salary)
obligation_templates.description: Compute monthly TDS on salaries based on employee declarations and deposit with monthly TDS.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Linked to TDS deposit/return penalties.

obligation_templates.title: Board Meetings – Minimum Four Per Year
obligation_templates.description: Hold minimum four board meetings per FY with gap between two meetings not exceeding 120 days.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Penalty u/s 173: Rs.25,000 on company and every officer in default.

obligation_templates.title: Annual General Meeting (AGM)
obligation_templates.description: Hold AGM within 6 months of FY end (15 months from previous AGM).
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Penalty u/s 99 up to Rs.1 lakh + Rs.5,000/day continuing default.

obligation_templates.title: Filing of Financial Statements (AOC-4)
obligation_templates.description: File audited financial statements with ROC within 30 days of AGM.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Additional fee Rs.100/day; penalty on company & officers u/s 137.

obligation_templates.title: Filing of Annual Return (MGT-7 / MGT-7A)
obligation_templates.description: File annual return with ROC within 60 days of AGM.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Additional fee Rs.100/day; penalty u/s 92.

obligation_templates.title: Director KYC (DIR-3 KYC)
obligation_templates.description: Every director with a DIN files annual KYC by 30 September.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: DIN deactivated; reactivation fee Rs.5,000 per director.

obligation_templates.title: Return of Deposits / Exempted Deposits (DPT-3)
obligation_templates.description: File annual return of deposits and amounts not considered deposits as on 31 March, by 30 June.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Penalty u/s 73/76A; additional fees.

obligation_templates.title: Half-Yearly Return of MSME Dues (MSME-1)
obligation_templates.description: Report outstanding dues to MSME suppliers beyond 45 days, half-yearly (Apr–Sep, Oct–Mar).
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Penalty u/s 405 on company & officers.

obligation_templates.title: CSR Reporting (CSR-2) & Spending
obligation_templates.description: Spend >=2% of average net profit (3 yrs) on CSR if thresholds met; file CSR-2; transfer unspent to designated account.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Penalty u/s 135(7): up to 2x unspent or Rs.1 crore (company); officer penalty.

obligation_templates.title: Auditor Appointment Filing (ADT-1)
obligation_templates.description: File ADT-1 within 15 days of auditor appointment/ratification at AGM.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Additional fees; non-filing penalty.

obligation_templates.title: Directors' Disclosure of Interest (MBP-1)
obligation_templates.description: Obtain MBP-1 from every director at first board meeting of FY and on any change.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Penalty u/s 184 on director in default; vacation of office risk.

obligation_templates.title: Directors' Non-Disqualification Declaration (DIR-8)
obligation_templates.description: Obtain DIR-8 from every director annually confirming non-disqualification.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Officer liability if disqualified director continues.

obligation_templates.title: Filing of Board/Special Resolutions (MGT-14)
obligation_templates.description: File MGT-14 within 30 days for resolutions requiring registration (e.g., s.179(3) items, special resolutions).
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Additional fees; penalty u/s 117.

obligation_templates.title: Significant Beneficial Owner Filing (BEN-2)
obligation_templates.description: File BEN-2 within 30 days of receipt of BEN-1 declaration of significant beneficial ownership.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Penalty u/s 90 on company & officers.

obligation_templates.title: Return of Allotment (PAS-3)
obligation_templates.description: File PAS-3 within 15 days (private placement) / 30 days of allotment of securities.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Additional fees; penalty u/s 39/42.

obligation_templates.title: Change in Directors (DIR-12)
obligation_templates.description: File DIR-12 within 30 days of appointment/resignation/change of directors.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Additional fees; penalty u/s 172.

obligation_templates.title: Secretarial Audit (MR-3)
obligation_templates.description: Obtain secretarial audit report from a PCS for prescribed companies; annex to Board report.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Penalty u/s 204 on company, officers and PCS.

obligation_templates.title: Maintenance of Statutory Registers
obligation_templates.description: Maintain and update statutory registers (members, directors, charges, contracts, SBO) on an ongoing basis.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Penalty u/s 88 etc. for non-maintenance.

obligation_templates.title: Net Owned Fund (NOF) Maintenance
obligation_templates.description: Maintain minimum NOF (Rs.10 crore for ICCs under glide path to 2027); monitor continuously.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Shortfall in NOF can lead to cancellation of Certificate of Registration.

obligation_templates.title: Capital Adequacy (CRAR) Maintenance
obligation_templates.description: Maintain minimum CRAR of 15% (Tier-I >=10%); monitor and report quarterly.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Breach is a prudential violation inviting supervisory/PCA action.

obligation_templates.title: Statutory Auditor Certificate (SAC) to RBI
obligation_templates.description: Submit annual Statutory Auditor's Certificate confirming the NBFC continues to undertake business requiring CoR and meets principal-business criteria (50-50 test).
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Non-submission flagged; can question continuance of CoR.

obligation_templates.title: Chief Compliance Officer & Compliance Function
obligation_templates.description: Maintain independent compliance function and a designated Chief Compliance Officer per RBI norms (Middle/Upper layer); annual board-reviewed compliance policy.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Governance lapse; adverse supervisory assessment.

obligation_templates.title: Risk-Based Internal Audit (RBIA) Framework
obligation_templates.description: Implement and operate a Board-approved Risk-Based Internal Audit framework with periodic reporting to Audit Committee.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: RBI direction; weak internal audit is a supervisory red flag.

obligation_templates.title: Fair Practices Code (FPC) – Review & Display
obligation_templates.description: Maintain, display and annually review a Board-approved Fair Practices Code; ensure pricing transparency and KFS issuance.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Consumer-protection violations attract RBI action.

obligation_templates.title: Interest Rate / Pricing Policy – Annual Review
obligation_templates.description: Board-approved interest rate model and policy on gradation of risk; reviewed annually.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Excessive/opaque pricing invites RBI scrutiny.

obligation_templates.title: KYC/AML Policy – Annual Board Review
obligation_templates.description: Maintain and annually review the Board-approved KYC/AML/CFT policy.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Outdated AML policy is a recurring inspection finding.

obligation_templates.title: Outsourcing Policy & Review
obligation_templates.description: Maintain Board-approved outsourcing policy; review material outsourcing arrangements and ensure RBI conditions are met.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Responsibility remains with NBFC; lapses attract action.

obligation_templates.title: Grievance Redressal & Internal Ombudsman
obligation_templates.description: Operate grievance redressal mechanism; appoint Internal Ombudsman where applicable; display GRO details.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: RBI ombudsman scheme coverage; reputational risk.

obligation_templates.title: Loans to Directors / Senior Officers – Board Approval & Disclosure
obligation_templates.description: Ensure loans/advances to directors, their relatives and senior officers follow Board-approved policy and disclosure norms.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Related-party/governance violation.

obligation_templates.title: Fraud Monitoring Return (FMR) to RBI
obligation_templates.description: Report frauds to RBI within prescribed timelines and file quarterly fraud monitoring returns; place fraud review before Board.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Delayed fraud reporting is a serious supervisory violation.

obligation_templates.title: IT Governance, Risk & Controls Framework
obligation_templates.description: Implement Board-approved IT governance framework, IS audit, BCP/DR per RBI Master Direction on IT Governance (effective Apr 2024).
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Cyber/IT lapses attract RBI action and operational risk.

obligation_templates.title: Cyber Security Incident Reporting to RBI
obligation_templates.description: Report cyber security incidents to RBI within the prescribed window (typically 2–6 hours of detection).
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Non-reporting is a serious supervisory and CERT-In violation.

obligation_templates.title: Foreign Investment Reporting (FC-GPR)
obligation_templates.description: Report issue of shares/eligible instruments to a person resident outside India within 30 days of allotment via FIRMS portal.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Late Submission Fee (LSF); compounding under FEMA for delay.

obligation_templates.title: Transfer of Shares Reporting (FC-TRS)
obligation_templates.description: Report transfer of capital instruments between resident and non-resident within 60 days via FIRMS.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: LSF / compounding for delay.

obligation_templates.title: Foreign Liabilities and Assets (FLA) Return
obligation_templates.description: File annual FLA return to RBI by 15 July for companies with foreign investment/overseas assets.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Non-filing is a FEMA contravention subject to compounding.

obligation_templates.title: External Commercial Borrowing Return (ECB-2)
obligation_templates.description: File monthly ECB-2 return for outstanding external commercial borrowings via AD bank.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Delay attracts LSF; affects further ECB eligibility.

obligation_templates.title: Annual Performance Report (APR) – Overseas Investment
obligation_templates.description: File APR for each overseas direct investment / JV-WOS by 31 December.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Non-filing is a FEMA contravention; blocks further remittances.

obligation_templates.title: POSH – Internal Committee & Annual Report
obligation_templates.description: Constitute Internal Committee (10+ employees), conduct awareness, and file annual POSH report with District Officer.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Penalty up to Rs.50,000; repeat – higher penalty & licence cancellation.

obligation_templates.title: POSH Disclosure in Board Report
obligation_templates.description: Include statement on POSH compliance and complaints in the Directors' Report.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Companies Act disclosure non-compliance.

obligation_templates.title: Payment of Bonus & Annual Return (Form D)
obligation_templates.description: Pay statutory bonus within 8 months of FY end and file annual return Form D.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Penalty / imprisonment under Bonus Act for default.

obligation_templates.title: Gratuity – Provisioning / Insurance
obligation_templates.description: Maintain gratuity provision/fund and (where mandated) compulsory gratuity insurance; display abstract.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Penalty under Gratuity Act for non-compliance.

obligation_templates.title: Shops & Establishments Registration / Renewal
obligation_templates.description: Maintain valid S&E registration for each establishment/branch and renew per state schedule.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Penalty / closure under state S&E Act.

obligation_templates.title: Digital Lending – Key Fact Statement (KFS) & APR Disclosure
obligation_templates.description: Issue standardised Key Fact Statement with all-inclusive APR to every digital-lending borrower; ensure cooling-off period and direct disbursal to borrower account.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Non-compliance with digital lending norms is a focus area of RBI enforcement.

obligation_templates.title: Digital Lending – LSP / DLA Due Diligence & Disclosure
obligation_templates.description: Maintain due diligence on Lending Service Providers/Digital Lending Apps, publish list on website, ensure data localization and grievance routing.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: RBI action including business restrictions for digital lending violations.

obligation_templates.title: Default Loss Guarantee (DLG) Cap Monitoring
obligation_templates.description: Ensure DLG arrangements with partners do not exceed 5% of the loan portfolio and are properly disclosed/invoked.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Breach of DLG cap is a prudential violation.

obligation_templates.title: Floating-Rate Reset & EMI Communication
obligation_templates.description: On benchmark reset, communicate revised EMI/tenor options to floating-rate retail borrowers per RBI Aug-2023 framework.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Consumer-protection violation; RBI scrutiny.

obligation_templates.title: CERSAI – Registration of Security Interest
obligation_templates.description: Register creation/modification/satisfaction of security interest with CERSAI within 30 days of the transaction.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Loss of priority of charge; SARFAESI enforcement issues.

obligation_templates.title: NBFC Auditors' Report to RBI
obligation_templates.description: Statutory auditor to report to RBI (in addition to Board) on regulatory compliance matters under NBFC Auditors' Report Directions; ensure exception reporting where applicable.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Adverse auditor report triggers RBI follow-up.

obligation_templates.title: Prior RBI Approval – Change in Control/Management
obligation_templates.description: Obtain prior written RBI approval for any takeover/acquisition of control or change in >30% of directors (excl. independent).
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Change without approval can invalidate CoR.

obligation_templates.title: Public Disclosure of Complaints
obligation_templates.description: Disclose complaints data and grievance redressal summary on website and in annual financial statements per RBI norms.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Transparency non-compliance; RBI scrutiny.

obligation_templates.title: Large Exposures Framework Monitoring (Upper Layer)
obligation_templates.description: Monitor and report single/group counterparty exposures within Large Exposure Framework limits (Upper Layer NBFCs).
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Limit breach is a prudential violation.

obligation_templates.title: Credit/Investment Concentration Norms Monitoring
obligation_templates.description: Monitor concentration of credit/investment (single & group borrower ceilings) and report breaches.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Prudential breach inviting supervisory action.

obligation_templates.title: Statutory Liquid Assets (SLR) Maintenance – NBFC-D
obligation_templates.description: Maintain prescribed % of public deposits in approved liquid securities (SLR) and report.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: SLR shortfall is a serious prudential violation.

obligation_templates.title: Deposit Repayment & Ceiling Compliance – NBFC-D
obligation_templates.description: Maintain deposits within ceiling, ensure investment-grade rating, and meet repayment reserve obligations.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Breach affects deposit acceptance authority.

obligation_templates.title: LODR Reg 52 – Financial Results (Listed NCDs)
obligation_templates.description: Submit standalone/consolidated financial results to stock exchange within 45 days of quarter-end (60 days for year-end) with line items per Reg 52(4).
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Fines per SEBI SOP; trading/issuance restrictions for persistent default.

obligation_templates.title: LODR Reg 50 – Prior Intimation of Board Meeting
obligation_templates.description: Give stock exchange prior intimation (>=2 working days) of board meetings considering results or fund-raising via NCDs.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Non-compliance fine per SEBI SOP.

obligation_templates.title: LODR Reg 57 – Interest/Redemption Payment Intimation
obligation_templates.description: Intimate stock exchange of interest/principal payment obligations and confirm payment within prescribed days; submit certificate.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Default in debt servicing disclosure is a serious violation.

obligation_templates.title: LODR Reg 54 – Asset Cover Certificate
obligation_templates.description: Maintain and submit asset cover certificate / security cover to debenture trustee and stock exchange alongside results.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Inadequate security cover triggers trustee/SEBI action.

obligation_templates.title: LODR Reg 56 – Documents to Debenture Trustee
obligation_templates.description: Provide periodic information/documents (security cover, end-use, defaults) to the debenture trustee.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Trustee escalation to SEBI for non-cooperation.

obligation_templates.title: LODR Reg 60 – Record Date Notice
obligation_templates.description: Notify stock exchange of record date for interest/redemption at least 7 working days in advance.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Fine per SEBI SOP.

obligation_templates.title: Large Corporate – Incremental Borrowing Disclosure
obligation_templates.description: Identified Large Corporates to disclose borrowing plan/compliance with qualified-borrowing norms to stock exchange.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Monetary disincentive for shortfall in market borrowing.

obligation_templates.title: Insider Trading – Structured Digital Database & Code
obligation_templates.description: Maintain Structured Digital Database of UPSI sharing, enforce code of conduct, and handle trading-window/closure for listed-debt issuer.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: SEBI penalties for PIT violations.

obligation_templates.title: Charge Creation/Modification (CHG-1)
obligation_templates.description: File CHG-1 within 30 days of creation/modification of a charge (on borrowings); condonable up to 120 days with additional fee.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Charge unenforceable if unregistered; additional fees.

obligation_templates.title: Satisfaction of Charge (CHG-4)
obligation_templates.description: File CHG-4 within 30 days of satisfaction/repayment of a charge.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Register shows charge outstanding; additional fees.

obligation_templates.title: GST – Reverse Charge Payment & Self-Invoicing
obligation_templates.description: Identify RCM liabilities (legal, GTA, import of services, unregistered procurement), pay in cash, and issue self-invoices.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Interest/penalty for short RCM payment; ITC denial.

obligation_templates.title: GSTR-6 – Input Service Distributor Return
obligation_templates.description: Where registered as ISD, distribute common ITC and file GSTR-6 monthly.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Mis-distribution invites demand.

obligation_templates.title: MSME Vendor Payment Timeline (Sec 43B(h))
obligation_templates.description: Ensure payments to MSE suppliers within 45/15 days to avoid disallowance; track outstanding for tax computation.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Disallowance of expense in the year if unpaid beyond limit.

obligation_templates.title: Equalisation Levy Statement (Form-1)
obligation_templates.description: Where applicable, deduct equalisation levy on specified services and file annual statement.
obligation_templates.penalty_note: Interest + penalty for non-compliance.
